ddls:
CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the video codec profile (e.g., CBP, BP, XP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profile */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the profile */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the profile was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the profile */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., I and P slices, Bit depth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_features" (
  "profile_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile-feature mapping */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "supported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is supported by the profile */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is enabled for the profile */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the feature for the profile */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or specifications for the feature in the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_features_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bit_depths" (
  "bit_depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit depth */,
  "bit_depth_value" TEXT /* Value of the bit depth (e.g., 8, 8 to 10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit depth */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the bit depth */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the bit depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chroma_formats" (
  "chroma_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chroma format */,
  "chroma_format_value" TEXT /* Value of the chroma format (e.g., 4:2:0, 4:2:2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chroma format */,
  "chroma_subsampling" TEXT /* Chroma subsampling ratio (e.g., 4:2:0, 4:2:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chroma_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_bit_depths" (
  "profile_bit_depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile-bit depth mapping */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile */,
  "bit_depth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bit depth */,
  "default_bit_depth" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bit depth is the default for the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_bit_depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_bit_depths_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_bit_depths_bit_depth_id FOREIGN KEY ("bit_depth_id") REFERENCES bit_depths ("bit_depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_chroma_formats" (
  "profile_chroma_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile-chroma format mapping */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile */,
  "chroma_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chroma format */,
  "default_chroma_format" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the chroma format is the default for the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_chroma_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_chroma_formats_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_chroma_formats_chroma_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("chroma_format_id") REFERENCES chroma_formats ("chroma_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, video engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., compression ratio, bitrate) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
